name: Travel Support Platform
overview: A comprehensive, cloud-based platform designed specifically for travel agencies and tour operators to manage bookings, itineraries, and customer support in one unified interface.

features.feature: Real-time Flight and Hotel Availability Sync

content:
## Streamline Your Travel Operations

The Travel Support Platform eliminates the need for fragmented spreadsheets and disconnected booking tools. Built with scalability in mind, it empowers agencies to handle peak season volumes effortlessly while providing travelers with a modern, mobile-friendly portal to view their trips.

name: Lendin
overview: A secure, compliant digital lending platform that accelerates the loan origination process for financial institutions.
content:
## Modernize the Borrowing Experience

Lendin reduces loan processing times from days to hours. By digitizing document collection, e-signatures, and identity verification, financial institutions can offer a frictionless experience that modern consumers expect, all while maintaining strict regulatory compliance.
